attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NCSM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
CAST('3500/01/01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  END_TV_DT,
 NCSM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NCSM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 NCSM.PROCESS_DT, 
 NCSM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 NCSM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NCSM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NCSM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NCSM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NCSM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NCSM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
 NCSM.TRADE_IN_AMT, 
 NCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 NCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
 NCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT, 
 NCSM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,
 NCSM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 NCSM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
 NCSM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG, 
 NCSM.REVENUE_FLAG,
 NCSM.RMA_FLAG, 
 NCSM.ACQUISITION_FLAG, 
 NCSM.OVERLAY_FLAG, 
 NCSM.IC_REVENUE_FLAG,
 NCSM.CHARGES_FLAG, 
 NCSM.MISC_FLAG, 
 NCSM.SERVICE_FLAG,
 NCSM.CORPORATE_COND_SALES_FLAG, 
 NCSM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NCSM.BOOKINGS_HOLD_PCT, 
 NCSM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 NCSM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/       
 NCSM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,      /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/
 NCSM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 NCSM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
 NCSM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
 NCSM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,

 USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 NCSM.POB_TYPE_CD, /* NRS MPOB Change */
 NCSM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* NRS PI3 Change */
 NULL,
 '=',
  /*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
 coalesce(NCSM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,-999) ,
  coalesce(NCSM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,-999)  
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */ 
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/
 
FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CONDITIONAL_SALES_MEASURE NCSM 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY  
 ON NCSM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
